notes: Guard Dog: embedded crash reporter and health watchdog. Global error trap, 10-report localStorage queue, non-alarming banner (Your data is safe), pre-filled email to support@cardiaclens.com. Health assertions run 8s after load then every 5 minutes: 10 core functions, 3 in-memory arrays, localStorage r/w, version key, migration guard, MCI and pinned events parse as arrays.
